metadata.title:
HOW TACOMA
SURPRISES


ITS RADICALS

Federal Injunction Closes
Mouths of "Agitators,"
clamoring for Munich
\ pal Ownership.

FOUGHT HIGHER FARES

pages.raw_text:
When "agitators," the new
phrase coined for those that advo-
cate anything for the benefit Of the
people at large, try to start any
thing In Tacoma that adversely af-
fects the public service corpora
tions they are promptly squeiched
by the mighty power Of a federal
injunction.


The other day the street railway
company at Tacoma raised the
price of fare from the Fern Hill
district into the city, or either way,
from to 10 cents. Naturally,
loud and vigorous protest went up
from the people, and being human,
they Sught the legal redress at
hand by launching campaign for
municipality owned street railways
and proposed to put the question up
to the people at the April election


However, the street railway com,
pany was too smart for them. 1t
took the case before Federal Judge
HanfOrd at Seattle and had an in
junction issued restraining the
committee of the "agitators" from
doing anything. BY strange CO.
incidence of the law the prelimin'
ary injunction is not returnable un-
til some time in March, when it will
then be too late to get the question
before the people at the April cleo
ton.


Peder Jensen, secretary of the
state board Of pharmacists, who
was in Spokane last night is a
member of this committee and has
been served with this injunction
Peder obeys judge-made law, while
he may not respect it, consequently
he is not giving his opinion of Fed
eral Judge Hanford's finding.


Spokane's radicals, since learn
ing of the turn of affairs in Ia
coma, have wondered if this is to
be the fate of the men who lead off
locally in the building of munich
pal electric light plant or urge that
the city eventually acquire its tele
phone, gas or street railway sys
TENS, as the people did in Tacoma
The new city charter, which is be
ing drawn under the commission
plan of government, provides for all
of these things. but 1t may be hard
to secure them If federal injunction
suits loom.
